description: Letter that mentions Avraham Maimonides - it seems that the writer asked him a question regarding legal procedure and now he is asking the recipient to go to him and obtain his ruling (?) . ENA 1822a.4 is possibly related to this document. Avraham Maimonides is referred to as "Nagid" in the letter, a title he held after 1213 during his tenure as Rayyis between 1205–1237 CE.
description_he: מכתב שמוזכר בו אברהם מימוניד — נראה שהכותב שאל אותו שאלה הלכתית ועכשיו מבקש מהנמען לגשת אליו ולקבל את פסיקתו. אברהם מימוניד מכונה 'נגיד', תואר שנשא לאחר 1213 לספירה.
